name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Dotnet.exe Exec Dll and Execute Unsigned Code LOLBIN
notes:
This Building Block detects dotnet.exe will execute any DLL and execute unsigned code.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Beyu Denis, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Dotnet.exe Exec Dll and Execute Unsigned Code LOLBIN
SIGMA Description: dotnet.exe will execute any DLL and execute unsigned code


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Dotnet.exe Exec Dll and Execute Unsigned Code LOLBIN on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of dotnet.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.csproj' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Dotnet.exe Exec Dll and Execute Unsigned Code LOLBIN on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of dotnet.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.dll' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.csproj' AQL filter query
